subject: Apply all taste-review fixes
description: Apply the 10 specific fixes from the taste review: wire Nav brand/season, fix subtitle font, fix TOC text sizes/opacity, fix mobile touch targets, delete dead divider span, handle dead event links, add prefers-reduced-motion.

subject: Create new Next.js 14 app skeleton at garam-masala-dating-app
description: Scaffold Next.js 14 app with App Router, Tailwind, TypeScript. Install firebase + lucide-react. Create .env.local, firebase.ts, layout.tsx with fonts + CSS vars, globals.css, and 4 empty routes.
